questionHtml: Suggest why Eva’s use of the linear regression equation in this way could be unreliable.
markschemeHtml:
EITHER

unreliable to use h on t equation to estimate t        A1


OR

unreliable to extrapolate from original data        A1


OR

rate of change (of height) might not remain constant (as the water drains out)      A1

 

[1 mark]

meta.title: Suggest why Eva’s use of the linear regression equation in this way could be unreliable.
